URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hepatitis-testing/ 
Hepatitis Testing 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is hepatitis testing? 
Hepatitis testing uses a sample of your blood to see if you have a current viral hepatitis infection or had one in the past. Hepatitis is a type of liver disease Â that causes liver inflammation (swelling) and damage. There are several types of hepatitis. Each affects the body and is spread in different ways.
Hepatitis A (HAV) is usually spread by eating
